basics.name: Saurav Sagar
basics.title: Operations Executive — Supply Chain & Logistics Operations
basics.summary: Operations and Supply Chain professional experienced in logistics execution, vendor coordination, and data-driven process improvement. Skilled in Power BI, SQL, and advanced Excel to analyse operational performance, optimise capacity utilisation, and support operational decision-making. Currently pursuing PGDM in Operations Management & Data Analytics.

experience.company: OM Logistics Supply Chain Pvt. Ltd.
bullets: Tracked daily operations and shipment movements of 50+ vehicles, ensuring 92% alignment between planned schedules and actual execution through real-time monitoring.
Conducted variance analysis on manpower utilisation, trip hours, and load planning, driving an 18% improvement in operational efficiency.
Coordinated with 20+ transport partners and warehouse teams to resolve logistics bottlenecks, improving SLA adherence from 83% to 95%.
Led root cause analysis of delivery delays and execution mismatches, reducing average delivery delays by 2 days.
Managed 1,200+ service requests with a 95% first-contact resolution rate across 8 operational regions.
Collaborated with operations and tech teams to resolve 500+ service disruptions, reducing incident resolution time by 25%.
Improved CRM workflow efficiency by optimising ticket routing and automation processes.
Identified recurring operational issues and proposed preventive workflow improvements.
Supported sales and distribution operations across 6+ retail locations by analysing store-level sales and inventory data.
Reduced stockouts by 18% and improved product availability by 22% through inventory coordination.
Coordinated with distributors and retailers to maintain accurate inventory records and timely replenishment.

projects.title: Logistics Performance Dashboard – Delhivery Operations Analysis
bullets: Developed a Power BI dashboard analysing logistics performance metrics including shipment flow, cut-off compliance, and operational KPIs.
Performed correlation analysis between planned vs actual delivery metrics to identify execution gaps and improve operational decision-making.

education.institution: G L Bajaj Institute of Management & Research

education.degree: Bachelor of Commerce — Accounting & Business Management

certifications: PMI Certified Professional in Managing AI
